{{Quote|Medical droid 318, please report to emergency sick bay.|318 is addressed over the public address system|audio=MedicalDroid3-18.flac|<ref name="The Lost Prince" />}}
'''318''' was a [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droid]] who worked at<ref name="The Lost Prince" /> a [[medical tent]] in [[Tyne's Horky (town)|Tyne's Horky]], a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] [[City/Legends|town]]<ref name="A Droid Adventure" /> located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Tyne's Horky|same name]].<ref name="The Revenge of Kybo Ren">{{DroidsCite|The Revenge of Kybo Ren}}</ref> In the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[15 BBY/Legends|15 BBY]],<ref name="Dating">{{SW|url=news/the-droids-re-animated-part-1|series=The Droids Re-Animated|text=Part 1|nolive=1}} dates the events of ''[[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO]]'' to fifteen [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before {{Film|IV}}. As ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of ''A New Hope'', including the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], to the year [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], the events of "[[The Lost Prince]]" can therefore be dated to [[15 BBY/Legends|15 BBY]].</ref> it was requested over the [[Tent/Legends|tent's]] [[Intercom/Legends|public address system]] that it report to the emergency [[Medical bay/Legends|sick bay]].<ref name="The Lost Prince" />

==Behind the scenes==
318 was first mentioned in "[[The Lost Prince]]," the fifth episode of the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] animated series ''[[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO]]'',<ref name="The Lost Prince" /> which originally aired on [[October 5]], [[1985]].<ref name="The Lost Prince air date">{{InsiderCite|27|A Star Wars CELibration|A ''Star Wars'' CELibration}}</ref>
